zh.lifeSummary: 當Emily Anscell於1483年出生在英國賀福爾金頓時，她的父親John Anscell15歲，母親Pernell Green13歲。她於1517年與Thomas Croxton Carter在英國賀特福爾基帕菲特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她於1872年住在英國英格蘭爾格拉本哈爾。她去世於1560年7月在英國英格蘭賀福爾金頓享年77歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emily Anscell于1483年出生在英国賀福爾金頓时，她的父亲John Anscell15岁，母亲Pernell Green13岁。她于1517年与Thomas Croxton Carter在英国賀特福爾基帕菲特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她于1872年住在英国英格兰爾格拉本哈爾。她去世于1560年7月在英国英格兰賀福爾金頓享年77岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Anscell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ansell
meanings: English: from a vernacular form of the personal name Anselmus (ancient Germanic Anshelm, Old French Anselm). See Anselm .
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Ansel  .
Swedish: from an unexplained first element + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.

nameMeanings.name: Emily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a medieval form of the Latin name Aemilia, the feminine version of the old Roman family name Aemilius (probably from aemulus ‘rival’). It was not common in the Middle Ages, but was revived in the 19th century and is extremely popular throughout the English-speaking world today. Its best-known 19th‐century bearer was probably the novelist and poet Emily Brontë ( 1818–48 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Emily Anscell was born in 1483, in Kington, Herefordshire, England, her father, John Anscell, was 15 and her mother, Pernell Green, was 13. She married Thomas Croxton Carter in 1517, in Chipperfield, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She lived in Grappenhall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom in 1872. She died in July 1560, in Kington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77, and was buried in Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emily Anscell est née en 1483, à Kington, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Anscell, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Pernell Green, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Croxton Carter en 1517, à Chipperfield, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle a vécu à Grappenhall, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1872. Elle est décédée en juillet 1560, à Kington, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emily Anscell 1483 in Kington, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Anscell 15 und ihre Mutter Pernell Green 13. Sie hat 1517 in Chipperfield, Hertfordshire, England Thomas Croxton Carter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1872 hat sie in Grappenhall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Sie starb im Juli 1560 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Kington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emily Anscell è nata il nel 1483 nel Kington, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, John Anscell, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Pernell Green, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Croxton Carter nel 1517, nel Chipperfield, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Grappenhall, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1872. Morì nel luglio 1560, nel Kington, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Emily Anscellが1483年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアキントンで生まれた時，父John Anscellは15歳，母Pernell Greenは13歳であった。1517年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアチップエルフィールドでThomas Croxton Carterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1872年にはイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアグラップエンハルに住んでいた。彼女は1560年7月にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアキントンで77歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Emily Anscell(이)가 1483년 영국 허퍼드실르 킨그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Anscell(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Pernell Green(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1517년 영국 허트퍼드실르 치p르필드에서 Thomas Croxton Carter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1872년도에 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 그랩홀에서 살았다. 그녀는 1560년 7월 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 킨그턴에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르에 묻혔다.

pt.1520: de 11 de janeiro de 1520 a 10 de janeiro de 1521
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emily Anscell nasceu em 1483, em Kington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Anscell, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Pernell Green, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Croxton Carter em 1517, em Chipperfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela viveu em Grappenhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1872. Ela faleceu em julho de 1560, em Kington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emily Anscell родилась в 1483 г. в местности кингтон, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Anscell было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Pernell Green, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Croxton Carter в 1517 г. в местности чиппирфиелд, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она жила в местности граппенолл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в 1872 году. Она умерла июль 1560 г. в местности кингтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности линколншир, Англия.

Se casó con Thomas Croxton Carter en 1517, en Chipperfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Grappenhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1872. Murió en julio de 1560, en Kington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
